name: Firecrawl
description: Public REST API for Firecrawl (v1) accessed using API keys as bearer tokens.

auth_methods.note: API keys are passed as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header. Docs mention contacting support for OAuth support.

credential_access.note: You can create API keys in the dashboard under Settings → API Keys. Scopes may be limited by plan.

api_surface.note: Base URL: https://api.firecrawl.dev/v1. Only the authentication page was observed, so full endpoint coverage is unknown.

buildability.note: API keys are available via the dashboard, but some endpoints require elevated scopes available on paid plans.
